mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.product_id, o.config_id, o.order_no, o.order_quantity, o.order_deadline, o.is_first_order, COALESCE(active_cfg.industry_preset, order_cfg.industry_preset) AS industry_preset, active_cfg.weight_v1, active_cfg.weight_v2, active_cfg.weight_v3, active_cfg.weight_v4, active_cfg.alpha_weight, p.product_name, p.product_code FROM orders o JOIN product p ON p.product_id = o.product_id LEFT JOIN OCSA_weight_config order_cfg ON order_cfg.config_id = o.config_id LEFT JOIN OCSA_weight_config active_cfg ON active_cfg.config_id = ( SELECT cfg.config_id FROM OCSA_weight_config cfg WHERE cfg.industry_preset = order_cfg.industry_preset ORDER BY CASE WHEN cfg.effective_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, cfg.effective_date DESC, cfg.config_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
